meta.title: HOLMETA
meta.description: Holmeta is a holistic browser kit for comfort, focus, insight, and local-first control.

home.title: The holistic browser kit for people who live in tabs.
home.subtitle: Holmeta is the holistic browser kit that brings adaptive appearance, intense light filtering, health alerts, meditation, site insight, translation, and a local vault into one command center.
home.supportLine: Browser-only. Local-first. One command center. Cancel anytime.

demo.summary: See appearance control, alert flow, and Holmeta command-center tools in one quick walkthrough.
demo.unsupported: Your browser does not support the demo video.

trust.kicker: BUILT FOR PEOPLE WHO LIVE IN TABS

why.title: What Holmeta gives you in one extension

items.title: Shape the page around you
items.body: Use adaptive Day / Night Appearance and stronger Light Filter presets to calm bright, chaotic, or inconsistent websites.

items.title: Protect focus and recovery
items.body: Run deep work sessions, health alerts, and meditation popups that help you reset without leaving the browser.

items.title: Keep context close
items.body: Open site insight, translation, screenshot, and local vault tools from the same Holmeta command center.

how.title: How Holmeta works
steps: Turn on the tools you need from one command center in under a minute
how.body: No stack of separate browser add-ons. Holmeta is designed as one holistic browser kit you can tune page by page.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
bullets: Adaptive Day / Night Appearance with dark, light, and ADAPT modes
Light Filter presets with stronger per-site tuning
Deep work, health alerts, and meditation popups
Site Insight, translation, screenshot, and local vault tools
pricing.foot: One clean subscription. No ads, no data selling, no pile of separate browser add-ons.

privacy.title: Built as a local-first browser kit
privacy.body: Holmeta runs where you work: inside the browser. Sensitive controls, vault data, and most daily workflow tools stay close to the page and local to your setup.

items.a: Holmeta is a holistic browser kit with ongoing updates, privacy-first local controls, and no ad-based business model. At $2/month, it replaces scattered browser utilities with one calmer command center.

Holmeta currently includes adaptive Day / Night Appearance, the Light Filter Tool, deep work controls, health alerts, meditation popups, Site Insight, translation, screenshot tools, and a local encrypted vault.
Holmeta v1 is browser-only by design.
You get access to Premium features for 3 days. Cancel anytime.
Billing and license records needed to unlock Premium. Core browsing controls run locally in your extension.
Chromium browsers now. Expand support later as store distribution grows.

pricingPage.subtitle: Full Holmeta access in one clean subscription. Adaptive appearance, filters, alerts, insight, and vault tools all stay inside the same command center.
pricingPage.yearlyNote: Prefer yearly billing? You can switch to it in checkout.
pricingPage.footer: Prices may localize by region. Stripe shows the final amount before you confirm.

dashboard.title: pick the Holmeta plan that fits your browser workflow
dashboard.body: One subscription unlocks adaptive appearance, light filters, alerts, meditation, site insight, translation, screenshot tools, and the local vault.
steps: Open /billing/success with your checkout session ID.
Reveal and copy your one-time license key.
Download the extension, paste the key, and turn on the tools you want.

yearly.title: HOLMETA YEARLY
yearly.detail: Yearly billing · best for daily use

subscribe.title: choose your Holmeta plan and continue to Stripe
subscribe.body: Start in Stripe Checkout. Billing Success reveals your license key and moves you straight into download and activation.

billingSuccess.title: your holmeta license key
billingSuccess.body: Save this key. It unlocks Holmeta in the extension and gives you access to every premium tool.
billingSuccess.statusAlreadyRevealed: STATUS: LICENSE ALREADY REVEALED FOR THIS SESSION
billingSuccess.activateTitle: Open Holmeta in under a minute
activateSteps: Download and load the extension in your browser.
Open the extension popup and go to Premium unlock.
Paste your license key and click Activate.
Return to the extension and switch on the tools you want.

download.title: download Holmeta and unlock your browser kit
download.flowBody: Start your 3-day trial first if you have not checked out yet. Already paid? Verify with your session ID or license key below to unlock download.
download.manualBody: After download: unzip → open chrome://extensions → enable Developer mode → Load unpacked → choose the extracted folder that contains manifest.json.
download.statusEnter: STATUS: ENTER SESSION ID OR LICENSE TO UNLOCK DOWNLOAD
download.statusNeedInput: STATUS: ENTER CHECKOUT SESSION ID OR LICENSE KEY
download.statusNoEntitlement: STATUS: NO ACTIVE TRIAL OR SUBSCRIPTION FOUND

billingHelp.title: license, cancellation, and refunds
billingHelp.body: Need help after checkout? Use this page to recover your license key, cancel in Stripe, or request a refund review.
cancelSteps: Click Manage Billing to open the Stripe billing portal.
billingHelp.refundBody: Refunds are handled case-by-case. Include your checkout session id and reason so support can review quickly.
billingHelp.subject: HOLMETA REFUND REQUEST
billingHelp.includeBody: session id, purchase date, and a brief issue summary

billingCancel.title: no charge was made
billingCancel.body: When you are ready, restart checkout and begin your 3-day trial.

privacyPage.title: Holmeta Privacy Posture
store: Extension settings and reminder logs are stored locally in your browser by default.
Stripe billing records and license hashes are stored server-side for subscriptions and unlock checks.
Entitlement state (trialing/active/inactive) is stored to unlock paid features.
notStore: No page-content harvesting for ad analytics.
processing: Screen filters and reminder overlays run in-browser.
Camera access is optional and requested only if webcam posture mode is enabled.
Billing, download gating, and license checks are processed through secure server functions.

termsPage.title: Holmeta Terms
scope: Holmeta provides a browser-based holistic kit for comfort, focus, recovery, insight, and utility workflows.
Holmeta is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
Some features require an active subscription.
billing: Yearly billing is also available where offered on the subscribe page.
Trial terms are shown in Stripe Checkout.
You can manage, cancel, or request refund review from billing support and Stripe portal.
acceptable: Do not use the service for unlawful activity.
Do not attempt to abuse billing, license, or entitlement systems.
Use at your own discretion in accordance with browser and platform policies.

statusPage.title: Holmeta Release Status
statusPage.monitoring: MONITORING: ENABLED (FUNCTION LOGS + CLIENT ERROR INGEST)

changelog.summary: Light Filters hardening: dark/light reading now uses safe single-strategy rendering with page-tone fallback clamps to prevent unreadable pages.
Production verification pass: Netlify env check, checkout smoke for monthly_a + yearly, gated download access control, and extension zip sync validation.
GA hardening: gated extension download, no-login license activation flow, and webhook idempotency checks.
Plan simplification: monthly_a + yearly only across checkout, validation, and smoke scripts.
Netlify build pipeline stabilized with extension zip sync and CSS integrity guard.
Homepage structure updated to mission-briefing format with browser-aware download flow.
